full_text:
Empress He 何皇后
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Empress He (何皇后)was born in Wan City, Nanyang Commandery. Emperor Shao’s mother. He Jin’s half-sister. Died of grief or through suicide. Empress He was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Empress He lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
